reason: Tested browser-use feature: agent successfully opened browser, navigated to https://example.com, retrieved page title, and responded with "Example Domain"

Clicked send button - Message sent, agent status changed to "working"
Waited for agent response with "Example Domain" text visible - Response received within 7 seconds showing tool calls for browser open and title retrieval
Verified response mentions "Example Domain" - Response clearly states "The page title is Example Domain."
